bug.description: watchdog timer not serviced on a long-running code path causing unexpected reset

prompt:
There is a watchdog timer not serviced on a long-running code path causing unexpected reset downstream of function usb_hstd_write_data_control_pipe in the arch/renesas/src subsystem.
The function is located at arch/renesas/src/rx65n/rx65n_usbhost.c:2123.
Please investigate and fix this issue.
